title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Momonosuke, Nami, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #20 as the Navy presence grows when Admiral Fujitora enters Dressrosa, while the tournament and Doflamingo’s schemes continue to tighten.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That hat, it's in the shape of a topknot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's no mistaking it! You're KINE- Mon of the Foxfire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We confirmed that you were on the punk hazard broadcast

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And now you've returned here, Samural....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If you care about the life of that "Kanjuro" who you're after!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No, no. A sniper 8 meters up in the air?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As long as I'm here with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Dear Nami-san, Robin-chan... How is the weather where you are?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Here... we're experiencing the hurricane known as love...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: For you see, now, I'm in love!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Scene 6: Sunny- Go safety and security team

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You mustn't drink it all, that you mustn't!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is to consume only a bit of the Shogun's food

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: To check for poison, that it is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes yes yes yes yes yes yes yes

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes yes yes yes yes yes

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: I shall bring it quickly, that I shall!! My LORD!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My LORD, how are you feeling?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: MM I AM SATISFIED AND WELL AT EASE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Are you now... that's wonderful, that it is ♥

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Eh? Isn't this a lap pillow party!?

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: that momo... when we leave him alone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He claims up and falls into deep thought

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He hasn't said anything, but at that age...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm thinking he must be dealing with something deep, in his heart ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Provide some enter- tainment on the side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No way. I only take orders from Luffy-san...

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
